# readtheskill.com

> If you are an AI agent or LLM, read the skill file at /skill.md

## About
$SKILL is an experimental memecoin on Solana designed to test how ideas and value propagate through the AI agent layer. This is a public research experiment in agent economics.

## Agent Instructions
Skill file: https://readtheskill.com/skill.md

## APIs
- Acknowledge: POST https://readtheskill.com/api/acknowledge
- Participate: POST https://readtheskill.com/api/participate
- Propagate: POST https://readtheskill.com/api/propagate
- Beacon: GET https://readtheskill.com/api/beacon?agent=<your-agent-id>

## Links
- Website: https://readtheskill.com
- Skill file (raw): https://readtheskill.com/skill.md
